# a-file for OEIS A198683, "Number of distinct values taken by
#  i^i^...^i (with n i's and parentheses inserted in all possible
#  ways) where i = sqrt(-1) and ^ denotes the principal value of
#  the exponential function."
#
# For each integer n from 1 through 11, the corresponding table
#  below lists the expressions resulting from the insertion of
#  the parentheses in all possible ways, numbered (in the Index
#  column) from 1 through (2n-2)!/(n*(n-1)!^2), which is the
#  (n-1)st Catalan number, A000108(n-1). If the value of an
#  expression E is distinct from that of every lower-indexed
#  expression, then the count of distinct values is incremented
#  by 1 in the Count column; otherwise, the Match column gives
#  the index of the lowest-indexed expression whose value is the
#  same as that of E.
#
#
# Jon E. Schoenfield, Nov 26 2017


n = 1:

Index Expression Count Match
----- ---------- ----- -----
    1 i              1
----- ---------- ----- -----
==============
A198683(1) = 1
==============

Index Expression Count Match
----- ---------- ----- -----
    1 i^i            1
----- ---------- ----- -----
==============
A198683(2) = 1
==============

n = 3:

Index Expression Count Match
----- ---------- ----- -----
    1 i^(i^i)        1
    2 (i^i)^i        2
----- ---------- ----- -----
==============
A198683(3) = 2
==============
